de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.executor

Interface RuleExecutor

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AntecTacletExecutor, FindTacletExecutor, InfFlowContractAppTacletExecutor, NoFindTacletExecutor, RewriteTacletExecutor, SuccTacletExecutor, TacletExecutor

    public interface RuleExecutor
    Executes a Rule with respect to a given instantiation of the schemavariables.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, Services services, RuleApp ruleApp)
      applies the given rule application to the specified goal

    • Method Detail

      • apply

        ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal,
                          Services services,
                          RuleApp ruleApp)
        applies the given rule application to the specified goal
        Parameters:
        goal - the goal that the rule application should refer to.
        services - the Services encapsulating all java information
        ruleApp - the rule application that is executed.
        Returns:
        List of the goals created by the rule which have to be proved. If this is a close-goal-taclet ( this.closeGoal () ), the first goal of the return list is the goal that should be closed (with the constraint this taclet is applied under).
